name: @zylem/spacetime-server
description: SpacetimeDB TypeScript module (entity transform replication) for Zylem multiplayer

scripts.publish:arena: sh scripts/run-spacetimedb-cli.sh publish arena -s local -p spacetimedb
scripts.publish:multiplayer-lobby: sh scripts/run-spacetimedb-cli.sh publish multiplayer-lobby -s local -p spacetimedb
scripts.publish:local: pnpm run publish:arena && pnpm run publish:multiplayer-lobby
scripts.dev: pnpm run build && pnpm run publish:local
